creator: shurd@sk.sympatico.ca
text:
When running some of the ports (I remember the iNES port but others do it
too with some variation on the version)
it returns the error 
ld.so failed: Can't find shared library "libXext.so.6.3"
I've tried creating a symbolic link to libXext.so.6 in the /usr/X11R6/lib
directory - no difference

How-To-Repeat: make install the iNES port (/usr/ports/emulators/ines) then try execting
the ines binary.
